query: SELECT DATE(`createdAt`), count(*), COALESCE(SUM(`orderValue`), 0) FROM `storyEvents` WHERE `establishmentId` = 30001 AND `eventType` = 'order_completed' AND `createdAt` >= '2026-02-28 05:00:00.000' GROUP BY DATE(`createdAt`) ORDER BY DATE(`createdAt`);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT DATE(`createdAt`), count(*), COALESCE(SUM(`orderValue`), 0) FROM `storyEvents` WHERE `establishmentId` = 30001 AND `eventType` = 'order_completed' AND `createdAt` >= '2026-02-28 05:00:00.000' GROUP BY DATE(`createdAt`) ORDER BY DATE(`createdAt`);
